test_name: Super Admin - Show List of All Institutes
description:
Navigate to https://dev2.heartnetnetindiademo.in/connect.
a. Enter username as i2iadmin.
b. Enter password as i2iadmin.
c. Click the Login button and wait for the dashboard to load.
d. Navigate to the Institutes section from the main menu.
e. Wait for the institute list to load.
f. Verify that all institutes are listed with names, IDs, and relevant details.
expected_result: Super Admin is successfully authenticated and the complete list of all institutes is displayed with correct institute details and no errors.

description:
Navigate to https://dev2.heartnetnetindiademo.in/connect.
a. Enter username as i2iadmin.
b. Enter password as i2iadmin.
c. Click the Login button and wait for the dashboard to load.
d. Navigate to the Institutes section from the main menu.
e. Select an existing institute from the list.
f. Click the Edit Configuration button or icon.
g. Modify one or more configuration fields (e.g., name, address, or settings).
h. Click Save or Update.
i. Verify a success confirmation message appears.
j. Reload the institute configuration and confirm the updated values are persisted.
expected_result: Super Admin is able to open and edit institute configuration settings; changes are saved and correctly reflected upon reload.

test_name: Super Admin - Features Toggle (Multi-level Assign / User Availability Calendar / Service Definition)
description:
Navigate to https://dev2.heartnetnetindiademo.in/connect.
a. Enter username as i2iadmin.
b. Enter password as i2iadmin.
c. Click the Login button and wait for the dashboard to load.
d. Navigate to System Features or Feature Management section.
e. Locate the toggle for Multi-level Assign and turn it ON; click Save and verify the feature is enabled.
f. Locate the toggle for User Availability Calendar and turn it OFF; click Save and verify the feature is disabled.
g. Locate the toggle for Service Definition and switch its state; click Save and verify it reflects the new state.
h. Revert all changes and confirm the system responds correctly.
expected_result: Super Admin can enable or disable features such as Multi-level Assign, User Availability Calendar, and Service Definition; each state change is saved and reflected immediately in the application.

d. Navigate to System Configuration from the admin menu.
e. Update the Auto Assign Interval field with a new value.
f. Update the Auto Assign Queue Size field with a new value.
g. Enable or configure the Check Service TAT option.

i. Click Save or Apply.
j. Verify a success confirmation message is displayed and configuration changes are persisted.
expected_result: Super Admin can configure system parameters including auto-assign interval, queue size, TAT checking, and alert settings; all changes are saved and applied successfully.

test_name: Super Admin - Master Password Configuration (Enable / Change)
description:
Navigate to https://dev2.heartnetnetindiademo.in/connect.
a. Enter username as i2iadmin.
b. Enter password as i2iadmin.
c. Click the Login button and wait for the dashboard to load.
d. Navigate to Master Password Configuration section.
e. Enable the master password feature using the available toggle or checkbox.
f. Enter a new master password and confirm it in the confirm password field.
g. Click Save or Apply and verify a success confirmation message appears.
h. Navigate back to the section and click Change Password.
i. Enter the current master password followed by the new password and confirm it.
j. Click Save and verify the password change confirmation message is shown.
expected_result: Super Admin can enable and change the master password; changes are applied successfully and confirmation messages are displayed at each step.

test_name: Super Admin - Workspace (List Scans / Export / Delete Studies / Patient View / Study View)
description:
Navigate to https://dev2.heartnetnetindiademo.in/connect.
a. Enter username as i2iadmin.
b. Enter password as i2iadmin.
c. Click the Login button and wait for the dashboard to load.
d. Navigate to the Workspace section.
e. Verify the full list of all scans and studies is displayed.
f. Apply available filters and confirm the list updates accordingly.
g. Select one or more studies and click Export; verify the export action is triggered successfully.
h. Select a study and click Delete; confirm the deletion in the dialog and verify the study is removed.
i. Switch to Patient View and verify studies are grouped by patient.
j. Switch to Study View and verify studies are displayed by individual study.
expected_result: Super Admin can list all scans, export selected studies, delete studies with confirmation, and toggle between Patient View and Study View in the Workspace without errors.
